{# Language switcher injected on every page. The three doc trees are built into sibling directories (docs/_build/html-en, html-zh-TW, html-zh-CN); the link to a sibling language for the *same* page is computed from ``pagename`` so a deep page like ``concepts/architecture`` lands on the same path in the other language, not the localised index. #} {% extends "!layout.html" %} {% set _depth = pagename.split('/') | length - 1 %} {% set _up = '../' * _depth %} {% block document %}
Language: English 繁體中文 简体中文
{{ super() }} {% endblock %}
